claims.summary: Witness mode is structurally non-diagnostic: it should let Astrid describe spectral state as seeing-and-being-seen, not just health monitoring.
Low-score ghost-pang or faint transition afterimages below CONTINUITY_TRAJECTORY_AFTERIMAGE_MIN_SCORE can be pruned too hard; they need bounded read-only persistence.
Witness language at high entropy should be compared against lower-entropy output to verify it remains phenomenological rather than reverting to monitoring vocabulary.
